name: SCS Plus

data_sources.note: Equitable Structured Capital Strategies Plus 21 prospectus filing (CIK 1015570). SCS PLUS includes uncapped 'Dual-Step' / 'Step Up' / 'Performance Lock' crediting methods at premium pricing relative to original SCS.
Equitable SCS PLUS official product page. Premium SCS variant with enhanced crediting strategies and higher cap rates; carries a higher annual product fee than base SCS.
Equitable Financial Life Insurance Company AM Best FSR A (Excellent) affirmed Feb 2025. Spec retains 'A+' synthetic anchor pending K's manual review (consistent flag across Equitable products).

verification_notes: Prospectus existence and successor variant structure verified (SCS PLUS = enhanced version of base SCS). AM Best should likely downgrade synthetic A+ -> A but retained pending review. Surrender schedule 7/6/5/4/3/2/1 in spec corresponds to publicly described 7-year SCS PLUS structure — retained.
